Hanison Construction Holdings ( (HK:0896) ) has provided an announcement.

Hanison Construction Holdings Limited has announced that its board of directors will meet on June 27, 2025, to approve the company’s final results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, and to consider the payment of a dividend. This meeting is significant as it will determine the financial outcomes and potential shareholder returns, impacting the company’s market positioning and stakeholder interests.

Hanison Construction Holdings Limited operates in the construction industry, focusing on providing construction services and related solutions. The company is involved in various construction projects and serves a diverse market, including residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.

data.title: Peet Limited Announces Interim CEO Amid Leadership Transition
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Peet Limited ( (AU:PPC) ) has issued an announcement.

Peet Limited, a company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: PPC), has announced a leadership transition as Mr. Brendan Gore steps down as Managing Director and CEO on July 1, 2025. Mr. Brett Fullarton, the current CFO, will take over as Interim CEO effective immediately to ensure a smooth transition. This change is part of a strategic move to maintain stability and continuity within the company while a search for a permanent CEO is conducted. Additionally, Mr. Mark Winkworth will serve as Interim CFO, highlighting Peet’s commitment to leveraging internal experience during this transitional phase.

More about Peet Limited

data.title: Nano Dimension’s Q1 2025 Financial Performance and Strategic Moves
data.description:
Nano Dimension Ltd ( (NNDM) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Nano Dimension Ltd presented to its investors.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Nano Dimension Ltd., a leader in Digital Manufacturing solutions, specializes in advanced technologies for industries such as defense, aerospace, automotive, electronics, and medical devices, focusing on high-mix, low-volume production with sustainable practices.

In its first quarter of 2025, Nano Dimension reported a revenue increase of 8% year-over-year, reaching $14.4 million, despite a challenging economic environment. The company has been undergoing a transformation to focus on high-performance customer solutions and efficiency improvements.

Key financial highlights include a gross margin decrease to 41% from 46% year-over-year, and an adjusted EBITDA loss of $9.0 million, which marks a 33% improvement from the previous year. The net loss also improved by 31%, reducing to $24.0 million. The company has initiated strategic cost-saving measures expected to save $20 million annually from Q4 2025.

Strategically, Nano Dimension has made significant acquisitions, including Desktop Metal and Markforged, with integration efforts underway to align them with the company’s financial and operational standards. Product innovation continues with the launch of new SMT solutions, FOX Ultra and PUMA Ultra.

Looking forward, Nano Dimension remains committed to building a scalable and profitable platform, focusing on operational synergies and product innovation, while keeping shareholders informed of ongoing strategic assessments.

data.title: Leafly Holdings Reports Q1 2025 Earnings Amid Challenges
data.description:
Leafly Holdings, Inc. ( (LFLY) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Leafly Holdings, Inc. presented to its investors.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Leafly Holdings, Inc. is an online cannabis discovery marketplace providing a comprehensive platform for cannabis consumers, featuring detailed information about cannabis strains, retailers, and current events. The company operates primarily in the cannabis industry and is headquartered in Seattle, Washington.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ended March 31, 2025, Leafly Holdings, Inc. reported a decline in revenue to $7.88 million from $9.05 million in the same period last year, alongside a net loss of $1.78 million, which is an improvement from the $2.39 million net loss recorded in the previous year.

Key financial highlights include a decrease in operating expenses to $8.32 million from $9.82 million, contributing to a reduced operating loss of $1.24 million compared to $1.75 million last year. The company also reported a decrease in cash and cash equivalents to $8.64 million from $14.53 million at the end of 2024, reflecting ongoing financial challenges.

Looking ahead, Leafly Holdings, Inc. faces significant financial hurdles, including the need to address its convertible promissory notes due in July 2025 and the challenge of raising sufficient capital to continue operations. The management is considering strategic options, including potentially taking the company private to reduce costs associated with being a public entity.

data.title: Benjamin Hornigold Ltd Reports Positive Returns Amid Ongoing Litigation
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Benjamin Hornigold Ltd. ( (AU:BHD) ) has issued an announcement.

Benjamin Hornigold Ltd reported a positive gross portfolio return of 2.94% for the month, with a Net Tangible Asset per share of 25.08 cents before tax. The company continues to pursue outstanding debts from John Bridgeman Ltd and JB Financial Group Pty Ltd, which, if recovered, could significantly benefit shareholders. Additionally, the company is navigating ongoing litigation related to these debts, with mediation scheduled before August 8. The recent banning of Peter Aardoom, a former director, by ASIC for eight years adds another layer of complexity to the company’s current challenges.

More about Benjamin Hornigold Ltd.

Benjamin Hornigold Ltd operates in the investment industry, focusing on strategies such as discount capture, arbitrage, deep value investments, and event-driven opportunities. The company aims to provide absolute returns through an opportunistic investment style, maintaining a flexible approach to capital allocation amidst market volatility.

Clearview Wealth Limited ( (AU:CVW) ) has issued an announcement.

ClearView Wealth Limited has announced a change in the address of its share registry office, operated by Computershare Investor Services Pty Limited, effective from 14 June 2025. The new location is Level 4, 44 Martin Place, Sydney, NSW 2000, while telephone numbers and postal addresses remain unchanged. This move requires all lodgements of documentation by member organizations, securityholders, and other parties to be made at the new address, potentially impacting the company’s administrative processes and stakeholder interactions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CVW) stock is a Buy with a A$0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Clearview Wealth Limited stock, see the AU:CVW Stock Forecast page.

More about Clearview Wealth Limited

ClearView Wealth Limited, established in 2010, is an ASX-listed life insurance company that collaborates with financial advisers to help Australians safeguard their wealth. The company manages over $380 million in inforce premiums and maintains relationships with over 1,000 Australian Financial Services Licensees, representing approximately 5,000 financial advisers.
